text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There's a haze shrouding my mind... It's so
frustrating... and it's weighing me down...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I don't like this haze at all...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win and make this haze disappear!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'll... do my best to meet your expectations!
